tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose tolerance or possible early diabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and calcium are normal. Recommend clinical follow-up for glycemic control and diabetes risk assessment.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
